templates.name: How is White Glove service scheduled?
templates.content: Our designated Delivery Company for your area will contact you by telephone several days in advance to schedule a specific day and an estimated delivery time. Please note that White Glove service is not available on weekends or national holidays.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.neimanmarcus.com/guest-order-history

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to give us a call at 1-888-888-4757, Monday-Sunday 6am - 12am CT. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/neimanmarcus/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/neimanmarcus

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: We are happy to honor requests for adjustment if your merchandise was purchased at regular price and then reduced within 10 days of purchase. For questions and adjustments, please give us a call at 1-888-888-4757. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.narvar.com/neimanmarcus/returns

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://stores.neimanmarcus.com/

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://assistance.neimanmarcus.com/returns#returnpolicy

templates.name: Can I return an online order in store?
templates.content: Please note that eligible items may be returned to a Neiman Marcus store for credit within 30 days of the delivery date. Please start your return and print your return slip using the order number here: https://returns.narvar.com/neimanmarcus/returns You will need this return slip to return items in store. Simply bring the merchandise and your return slip to any store sales associate.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to give us a call at 1-888-888-4757. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Shipping times for furniture
templates.content: Furniture items are shipped directly from the manufacturer to your door. Please allow up to 4 to 6 weeks for delivery. Most large pieces, determined by dimensions and weight, as well as certain items that require extensive assembly or setup, are delivered using our White Glove service and various other items will be delivered using our Inside Entryway service.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.neimanmarcus.com/c/sale-all-sale-cat56750744

templates.name: Is there a charge for White Glove service?
templates.content: White Glove service is included in the cost of shipping.

templates.name: What is Inside Entryway service?
templates.content: The Delivery Company delivers the item in the carton through the door of the residence or the garage door. The Delivery Company does not unpack, does not assemble, does not place in area or room of choice, and does not remove packing material. Inside Entryway service is available within the continental U.S. only and is not available on weekends or national holidays.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via FedEx, USPS or DHL and once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Can I place an order over the phone?
templates.content: Please call us at 1-800-944-9888 to place an order and have your credit card number ready. For orders outside the U.S. (U.S. Virgin Islands, Puerto Rico, or Canada) please give us a call at 972-556-6021.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-888-888-4757 Monday - Sunday, 6am-12am, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to give us a call at 1-888-888-4757. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Is there a charge for Inside Entryway service?
templates.content: There is no additional charge for Inside Entryway service.

templates.name: What is White Glove service?
templates.content: The Delivery Company brings the item into the room or area of choice (including up or down stairs), uncrates it, assembles it (if necessary), positions it, and removes all shipping materials. If you have any questions about White Glove Service, please call us at 1-800-649-5429.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to give us a call at 1-888-888-4757. Our team is more than happy to look into this for you!

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Please note that sizing varies greatly between designers. If you are familiar with a designer, please order the size you normally do. If not, please match your measurements (in inches) to the size guide provided on each product page.

templates.name: Expedited shipping
templates.content: Neiman Marcus: Thanks for letting me know. I'm afraid, we don't have a next-day delivery at the moment but we do offer same-day delivery if you order at 12:00 noon CT. Please note that it is available Monday through Friday only for select zip codes and eligible in-stock merchandise. Holidays are excluded. If there is an unexpected delay, we will make every effort to deliver the order the next business day. A signature and phone number are required. Not available for PO boxes or APO addresses. For more info, please check out our shipping information here: https://neimanmarcus.attn.tv/aYN-05hInp7G Let me know if you have further questions. I'm happy to help!
